codeReview.summary: Commit e9ee4f7 only removed go.mod, go.sum, cmd/server/main.go, and vite.config.ts but did NOT remove the orphaned Go source files in apps/api/internal/. The following Go files still exist: apps/api/internal/auth/google.go, apps/api/internal/auth/service.go, apps/api/internal/auth/service_test.go, apps/api/internal/auth/session.go, apps/api/internal/auth/session_test.go, apps/api/internal/config/config.go, apps/api/internal/httpapi/auth_adapter.go, apps/api/internal/httpapi/handler_test.go, apps/api/internal/httpapi/server.go.

summary: RE-REVIEW: Feature still FAIL. Commit e9ee4f7 only removed go.mod, go.sum, cmd/server/main.go, and vite.config.ts. The 9 orphaned Go source files in apps/api/internal/auth/, apps/api/internal/config/, and apps/api/internal/httpapi/ directories still exist and were not removed. The fix was incomplete.
